titleStmt.title: SII 19.130: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 130. (A.R. No. 46 of 1910.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This records an endowment of 3 vēli of land (by the king) at the request of Śiṅgaṉ Kaliyaṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Kommaipākkam with its annual produce of 710 kalam of paddy specifically allotted for the various requirements of worship in the temple of Tirukkarugāvūr-Mahādēvar. This apportionment was made through the officers Kōyil-Mayilai alias Madhurāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Śiṟṟiṅgaṇ and Śāttaṉ Paśupati alias Kaliyaṉ Taṇḍēśvaraṉ. The and is said to have adjoined a bigger plot of 40 vēli endowed to the temple at Tiruvalañjuḻi, from which it seems to have been separated as being in excess of the needs of that temple. This is evidently an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 5
āvatu tirukkarukāvūr mahaādevar Ittirukka
rukāvūr pottaka ttuva
runilam nāṟpatiṉvelikkiḻ I
Iṉilaṉ muveli muveliyum
Uṭaiyār tiruvalañcuḻi śrīkoyi
vaittu Ayppikai viṣu saṅki
rānti yelvaiyiṟ tāṉañ ceyyāvi
kkommaipākkamuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkaṉ
kaliyaṉāṉa Uttamacoḻamuventaveḷāṉ viṇ
ṇappattāl yāṇṭu 5Āvatumutal Iṟaiyiliyāka
k kuṭutta nilaṉ muveliyiṉā laṭaippaṭi nellu
Ūṟkālāl Eḻunūṟṟorupatiṉkalamum Atikārikaḷ
ṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyāṉ koyilmayilaiyāṉa mati rān
takamuventaveḷāṉum cāttaṉ pacuvatiyāṉa kaliya
n taṇṭeśvaraṉum panmāheśvararum mulaparuṭaiyā
rum Āḷvārkku veṇṭu nivanta maṭaittapaṭi Ā
Amitu ceyya nittaṅ kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi yariciyuṅ kuṟu
yuṭpaṭa nitta nellu tūṇiyāka Orāṭṭaikku
nellu ḷakku pattiṉu
kku nittam nellu Iru ṭainā
ḷaikku nellu muṉṉūṟṟukku viḷakke
ṇṇaikku nellu pati pā riruvark
ku kappaṭamutaluṭpaṭa Orāṭṭaikku nellu Eḻupatiṉka
lam tiruccantaṇam nicatam Oru pala māka Orāṭṭaikku ne
llu muppatiṉkalaṅ kuṅkilipattukku Orāṭṭaikku
nellu patiṉkalaṅ karumāṇikkatevarkku tiruvamirtukku
nicatam nellu patakkāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu Aṟupa
tiṉ kala mittevarkku nontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku nel
lu muppa tiṉkalaṅ kaṇavatiyār mirtukku nicatane
llu Aññāḻiyāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu patiṉeṇkalaṉeyi
ru tūṇikkuṟuṇi Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.130 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
